heading: Prohibition on requirement to disclose personally identifiable information in requests for certain maintenance
label: 2892b Prohibition on requirement to disclose personally identifiable information in requests for certain maintenance
text: A landlord responsible for a housing unit may not require the disclosure of personally identifiable information as a part of the submission of a request for maintenance regarding a housing unit or common area when the disclosure of personally identifiable information is not needed to identify the location at which such maintenance will be performed.
